channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: San Diego FC signs Escondido native Milan Iloski from FC Nordsjaelland
item.description: San Diego FC has acquired forward Milan Iloski on loan from its sister club, FC Nordsjaelland (FCN), the club announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Why Olivia Dunne and Paul Skenes' relationship nearly never took off
item.description: Olivia Dunne and Paul Skenes opened up about their relationship and why it nearly never got off the ground, and it all has to do with social media.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kurtenbach: We learned everything we needed to know in the Warriors’ win over the Grizzlies
item.description: A perfect game from Curry, Butler, and Green gave the Dubs breathing room in the Western Conference standings.
item.dc:creator: Dieter Kurtenbach, The Mercury News

item.title: How golf helped ‘recharged and rejuvenated’ Steph Curry prepare for Warriors’ stretch run
item.description: Golden State Warriors coach Steve Kerr on Steph Curry: "I think two rounds of golf on this road trip helped"
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: US Olympic officials fire coach, director over reported sexual abuse
item.description: The firings come after The Associated Press reported that the coach was accused of sexually abusing a young biathlete.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Steph Curry leads Warriors to crucial victory behind 52-point performance
item.description: Golden State Warriors star Stephen Curry made 12 3-pointers in the team's crucial win over the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday night. He scored 52 points.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-NFL kicker 'seriously considering' Congress run: report
item.description: Jay Feely, who spent time kicking for six NFL teams in his career, is reportedly "seriously considering" a Congress run in Arizona.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Detroit Pistons head coach J.B. Bickerstaff talks suspensions, team unity, and West Coast road trip
item.description: Detroit Pistons head coach J.B. Bickerstaff talked about team chemistry, the brawl with the Minnesota Timberwolves, and the suspensions from the NBA handed down to Isaiah Stewart, Ron Holland II, and Marcus Sasser ahead of their West Coast road trip.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Jokic scores career-high 61 points, plays nearly 53 minutes in 140-139 double-OT loss to Wolves
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Michael Malone called him Superman. At the moment, Nikola Jokic’s just super-tired. The Denver Nuggets big man can't wait to get some sleep after a career-best 61-point performance in which he played nearly 53 minutes.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: After cheating death, Dodgers pitcher Dustin May makes his way back to the mound a changed man
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Dustin May took the mound for the Los Angeles Dodgers a changed man. Making his first major league start since May 17, 2023, he allowed just one hit and an unearned run over five innings in the Dodgers' 3-1 victory over the Atlanta Braves on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers improve to 7-0 behind Dustin May after beating winless Braves 3-1
item.description: Dustin May pitched five strong innings after missing nearly two years, Mookie Betts hit his third go-ahead homer of the season and the Los Angeles Dodgers beat the winless Atlanta Braves 3-1.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Curry hits 12 3s and scores 51 as Warriors moving up in the West with a victory over the Grizzlies
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — The last time Stephen Curry and Golden State played in Memphis, he was held without a field goal and the Warriors lost by 51 points. Curry didn’t recall the frustration from that loss in December. And there was no repeat on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nothing but the tooth for the Utah Hockey Club
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The average person has 28 teeth. Most hockey players have fewer. With a chance of getting hit in the mouth with a puck, or a stick, or with a fist, a lot of them have lost a tooth, Or two, Or three.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nevada schools ban trans athletes from girls sports in major reversal for state
item.description: The Nevada Interscholastic Activities Association (NIAA) voted on Tuesday to ban trans athletes from girls sports after a year plagued by controversy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Michigan State's Holloman, Booker, Michigan's Donaldson enter transfer portal, St. John's adds Sanon
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Michigan State's Tre Holloman plans to end his college career at another school and Xavier Booker is shooting for a fresh start. Holloman's agent, Brandon Grier, said the guard entered the transfer portal and informed coach Tom Izzo of his decision on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LPGA Tour takes center stage in Las Vegas as PGA Tour plots future return
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Reigning Player of the Year and world No. 1 Nelly Korda is back in the Las Vegas area this week to defend her T-Mobile Match Play title.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Carson Kelly becomes 1st Cubs player to hit for the cycle in 32 years
item.description: WEST SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — Carson Kelly had come close to hitting for the cycle, yet that elusive triple kept holding him back. He had just two triples over a 10-year big league career before Monday night. That's when Kelly became the first Chicago Cubs player in 32 years to hit for the cycle.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kanon Catchings enters transfer portal
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After a disappointing freshman season, BYU forward Kanon Catchings has entered the transfer portal. The highly-touted 4-star recruit came to BYU with high expectations. But injuries and lack of playing time derailed his freshman season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 5 players, 2 coaches ejected after Pistons-Timberwolves skirmish in 2nd quarter
item.description: Five players and two coaches were ejected after a fight broke out in the second quarter in the Minnesota Timberwolves' victory over the Detroit Pistons on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK DONNELLY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Royals' Jonathan India hit by 99 mph fastball, leaves game
item.description: "He threw a pitch that he doesn't ever throw, the pitch before, which was a four-seam fastball. It was his first one of the year," Pasquantino said.
item.dc:creator: Jared Bush, NewsNation

item.title: Milos Uzan's late bucket on inbound play sends Houston into Elite Eight with 62-60 win over Purdue
item.description: Houston spent time this week practicing an inbound play that coach Kelvin Sampson thought his team might need against Purdue.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marot, Fox 5

item.title: Opening Day 2025: Cubs have a winning Opening Day record, featuring some memorable moments
item.description: CHICAGO — Opening Day is finally upon us. It's a day that comes with a sense of hope among baseball fans in early spring, a season that represents new beginnings often exemplified by the warmer temperatures and the blooming of trees and flowers.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox DFA Oscar Colás, claim switch-hitting outfielder off waivers from Rockies
item.description: The Chicago White Sox designated top prospect Oscar Colás for assignment and claimed switch-hitting outfielder Greg Jones off waivers from the Colorado Rockies, while reassigned five players to minor league camp and optioned right-handed pitcher Justin Anderson to Triple-A.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Softball: Poway 2, Patrick Henry 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- A gorgeous day to play softball on Monday afternoon with Patrick Henry hosting Poway. The Titans won a fantastic game 2-0 in 10 innings. Great pitching on both sides with Mya McGowan leading the way for Poway with a complete game shutout and adding 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5
